name: PCB Doctor
motive: AI repair assistant using camera, thermal camera, multimeter/programmer data, and guided diagnosis to find PCB faults and suggest repairs/design changes.
priority_reason: Most practical and commercially useful hardware/electronics product.
next_build: Add guided measurement workflows, PyVISA instrument hooks, thermal hotspot overlay, Multimodal RAG over datasheets/schematics/images, Mermaid repair diagrams, local eval tests, and repair report export.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS can explain measurements, retrieve datasheets, guide repair steps, and generate reports.
safety_boundary: No unsafe bench power actions without user confirmation and current limiting.
